subcodes.first_line: O thou who art thrice-blessed with grace, render thanks unto the Lord of Oneness that thou art in the realm of divine order and wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المثلث بالنعمه شکر کن حضرت احدیت را که در کشور نظم شهریاری و در حکمت
subcodes.subjects: @poems and quotation from poetry, @literature; drama; humanities; the arts, @praise and encouragement
